Part.Source:
Do Case Case &EmpCmp < 499 do 'SQL_Reorg_17.499' Case &EmpCmp < 500 do 'SQL_Reorg_17.500' Case &EmpCmp < 501 do 'SQL_Reorg_17.501' Case &EmpCmp < 502 do 'SQL_Reorg_17.502' Case &EmpCmp < 503 do 'SQL_Reorg_17.503' CAse &EmpCmp < 504 do 'SQL_Reorg_17.504' Case &EmpCmp < 505 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.505' Case &EmpCmp < 506 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.506' Case &EmpCmp < 507 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.507' Case &EmpCmp < 508 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.508' Case &EmpCmp < 509 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.509' Case &EmpCmp < 510 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.510' Case &EmpCmp < 511 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.511' Case &EmpCmp < 512 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.512' Case &EmpCmp < 513 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.513' Case &EmpCmp < 514 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.514' Case &EmpCmp < 515 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.515' Case &EmpCmp < 516 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.516' Case &EmpCmp < 518 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.518' Case &EmpCmp < 519 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.519' Case &EmpCmp < 520 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.520' Case &EmpCmp < 521 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.521' Case &EmpCmp < 522 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.522' Case &EmpCmp < 523 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.523' Case &EmpCmp < 524 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.524' Case &EmpCmp < 525 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.525' Case &EmpCmp < 526 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.526' Case &EmpCmp < 527 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.527' Case &EmpCmp < 528 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.528' Case &EmpCmp < 529 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.529' Case &EmpCmp < 530 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.530' Case &EmpCmp < 531 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.531' Case &EmpCmp < 532 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.532' Case &EmpCmp < 533 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.533' Case &EmpCmp < 534 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.534' Case &EmpCmp < 535 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.535' Case &EmpCmp < 536 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.536' Case &EmpCmp < 537 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.537' Case &EmpCmp < 538 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.538' Case &EmpCmp < 539 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.539' Case &EmpCmp < 540 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.540' Case &EmpCmp < 541 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.541' CAse &EmpCmp < 542 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.542' CAse &EmpCmp < 543 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.543' CAse &EmpCmp < 544 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.544' CAse &EmpCmp < 545 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.545' CAse &EmpCmp < 546 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.546' Case &EmpCmp < 547 do 'SQL_Reorg_17.547' Case &EmpCmp < 548 do 'SQL_Reorg_17.548' Case &EmpCmp < 549 do 'SQL_Reorg_17.549' Case &EmpCmp < 550 do 'SQL_Reorg_17.550' EndCase
Sub 'RodaScript' if &IsWeb <> true msg(&sql, status) Endif
If &sql.IsEmpty() &sql = &Mensagem do 'Atualiza' Else do 'Atualiza' sql [!&sql!] EndIF commit &sql = ''
if &IsWeb <> true msg('EXE. SUCESSO', status) Endif EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.550' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'PedidoProdutoPagarItem' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'PedProPagQtd') ALTER TABLE [PedidoProdutoPagarItem] ADD [PedProPagQtd] DECIMAL(17,6) NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'PedidoProduto' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'PedItmPagQtdTot') ALTER TABLE [PedidoProduto] ADD [PedItmPagQtdTot] DECIMAL(17,6) NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'PedidoProduto' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'PedItmPagQtdSel') ALTER TABLE [PedidoProduto] ADD [PedItmPagQtdSel] DECIMAL(17,6) NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'PedidoProduto' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'PedItmPagVlrTotCreOrd') ALTER TABLE [PedidoProduto] ADD [PedItmPagVlrTotCreOrd] DECIMAL(18,2) NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'PedidoProduto' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'PedItmPagQtdTotCreOrd') ALTER TABLE [PedidoProduto] ADD PedItmPagQtdTotCreOrd DECIMAL(18,6) NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'DuplicatasPagamento' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'CrePagVinPedCod') ALTER TABLE [DuplicatasPagamento] ADD [CrePagVinPedCod] INT NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'DuplicatasPagamento' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'CrePagVinObs') ALTER TABLE [DuplicatasPagamento] ADD [CrePagVinObs] VARCHAR(40) NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'PedidoProduto' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'PedItmPagQtdTotCreOrd') ALTER TABLE [PedidoProduto] ADD [PedItmPagQtdTotCreOrd] DECIMAL(17,6) NULL" Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.549' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'CtaVctCer') ALTER TABLE [Contas] ADD [CtaVctCer] DATETIME NULL " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.548' &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'ConsultaPlacasEmpresa') CREATE TABLE [ConsultaPlacasEmpresa] ( " &sql += " [ConsPla] VARCHAR(8) NOT NULL, " &sql += " [ConsDtaHra] DATETIME NOT NULL, " &sql += " [ConsEmpCod] INT NULL, " &sql += " PRIMARY KEY ( [ConsPla],[ConsDtaHra] )) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'ConsultaPlacas') CREATE TABLE [ConsultaPlacas] ( " &sql += " [ConsPla] VARCHAR(8) NOT NULL, " &sql += " [ConsJson] VARCHAR(MAX) NULL, " &sql += " PRIMARY KEY ( [ConsPla] )) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'NfeIsNFAe') ALTER TABLE [Notas] ADD [NfeIsNFAe] BIT NULL " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.547' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'CxItmAlert') ALTER TABLE [CaixaItem] ADD [CxItmAlert] VARCHAR(500) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' EndSUb
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.546' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'FilArt') ALTER TABLE [Filial] ADD [FilArt] VARCHAR(40) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PedFrpAd') ALTER TABLE [PedidoPgto] ADD [PedFrpAd] VARCHAR(MAX) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'TemplateWhatsapp') CREATE TABLE [dbo].[TemplateWhatsapp]( " &sql += " [EmpCod] [int] NOT NULL, " &sql += " [TplwGUID] [uniqueidentifier] NOT NULL, " &sql += " [TplwNom] [varchar](100) NULL, " &sql += " [TplwTip] [smallint] NULL, " &sql += " [TplwPad] [bit] NULL, " &sql += " [TplwTxt] [nvarchar](1000) NULL, " &sql += " PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED ( " &sql += " [EmpCod] ASC, [TplwGUID] ASC " &sql += " ) ON [PRIMARY] ) " Do 'RodaScript' EndSUb
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.545' &sql = "IF EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'Atualizacoes') DROP TABLE [Atualizacoes] " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'CbrWebhook') ALTER TABLE [LocalCobranca] ADD [CbrWebhook] VARCHAR(200) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'CbrWebhookPix') ALTER TABLE [LocalCobranca] ADD [CbrWebhookPix] VARCHAR(200) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'CreCodSol') ALTER TABLE [Duplicatas] ADD [CreCodSol] VARCHAR(200) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PedFrpPixPago') ALTER TABLE [PedidoPgto] ADD [PedFrpPixPago] BIT NULL " Do 'RodaScript' EndSUb
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.544' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PesSenChvCmp') ALTER TABLE [Pessoa] ADD [PesSenChvCmp] VARCHAR(128) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PdvPixCbrCod') ALTER TABLE [PDV] ADD [PdvPixCbrCod] INT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.543'
&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'TEF' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'TefBandCod') ALTER TABLE [TEF] ADD [TefBandCod] INT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'TEF' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'TefBandCnpj') ALTER TABLE [TEF] ADD [TefBandCnpj] VARCHAR(18) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'TEF' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'TefCardNom') ALTER TABLE [TEF] ADD [TefCardNom] VARCHAR(100) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = "IF EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'TEF' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'TefImpCod') ALTER TABLE [TEF] DROP COLUMN [TefImpCod] " Do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = "IF EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'TEF' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'TefPlanCod') ALTER TABLE [TEF] DROP COLUMN [TefPlanCod] " Do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'PedidoPgto' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'PedFrpCardNom') ALTER TABLE [PedidoPgto] ADD [PedFrpCardNom] VARCHAR(100) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.542' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'EmpresaImpressora' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'EmpImpFilCod') ALTER TABLE [EmpresaImpressora] ADD [EmpImpFilCod] INT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'Produto' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'ProNomApl') ALTER TABLE [Produto] ADD [ProNomApl] VARCHAR(MAX) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'Aplicacao') CREATE TABLE [Aplicacao] ( " &sql += "[EmpCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql += "[AplCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql += "[AplNom] VARCHAR(100) NULL, " &sql += "PRIMARY KEY ( [EmpCod],[AplCod] )) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'ProdutoAplicacao') CREATE TABLE [ProdutoAplicacao] ( " &sql += " [EmpCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql += " [ProCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql += " [AplCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql += " [ProAplOrd] INT NULL, " &sql += " PRIMARY KEY ( [EmpCod],[ProCod],[AplCod] )) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.indexes where name = 'IPRODUTOAPLICACAOAPL1') CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IPRODUTOAPLICACAOAPL1] ON [ProdutoAplicacao] ([EmpCod], [AplCod]) " Do 'RodaScript' EndSUb
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.541'
&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'ConfSistema' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'TCon193') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon193] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'ConfSistema' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'TCon186') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon186] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'ConfSistema' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'TCon187') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon187] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'ConfSistema' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'TCon188') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon188] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'ConfSistema' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'TCon189') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon189] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'ConfSistema' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'TCon190') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon190] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'ConfSistema' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'TCon191') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon191] DECIMAL(17,2) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'ConfSistema' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'TCon192') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon192] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' EndSUb
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.540' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'ConfSistema' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'TCon186') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon186] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'ConfSistema' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'TCon187') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon187] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'ConfSistema' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'TCon188') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon188] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'ConfSistema' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'TCon189') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon189] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'ConfSistema' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'TCon190') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon190] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'ConfSistema' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'TCon191') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon191] DECIMAL(17,2) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'ConfSistema' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'TCon192') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon192] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'Contas' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'CtaBanPixApi') ALTER TABLE [Contas] ADD [CtaBanPixApi] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'Contas' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'CtaBanPixCliId') ALTER TABLE [Contas] ADD [CtaBanPixCliId] VARCHAR(100) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'Contas' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'CtaBanPixCliSec') ALTER TABLE [Contas] ADD [CtaBanPixCliSec] VARCHAR(40) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'Contas' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'CtaBanPixCer') ALTER TABLE [Contas] ADD [CtaBanPixCer] VARBINARY(MAX) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'Contas' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'CtaBanPixCerExt') ALTER TABLE [Contas] ADD [CtaBanPixCerExt] VARCHAR(20) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'Contas' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'CtaBanPixCerNom') ALTER TABLE [Contas] ADD [CtaBanPixCerNom] VARCHAR(40) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'Contas' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'CtaBanPixEsc') ALTER TABLE [Contas] ADD [CtaBanPixEsc] VARCHAR(MAX) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'Contas' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'CtaBanPixKey') ALTER TABLE [Contas] ADD [CtaBanPixKey] VARBINARY(MAX) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'Contas' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'CtaBanPixKeyExt') ALTER TABLE [Contas] ADD [CtaBanPixKeyExt] VARCHAR(20) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'Contas' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'CtaBanPixKeyNom') ALTER TABLE [Contas] ADD [CtaBanPixKeyNom] VARCHAR(100) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'Contas' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'CtaBanPixCad') ALTER TABLE [Contas] ADD [CtaBanPixCad] VARBINARY(MAX) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'Contas' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'CtaBanPixCadExt') ALTER TABLE [Contas] ADD [CtaBanPixCadExt] VARCHAR(10) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'Contas' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'CtaBanPixCadNom') ALTER TABLE [Contas] ADD [CtaBanPixCadNom] VARCHAR(100) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.539'
&Sql = "IF EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'FuncionarioSenha' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'PesSenLoc') ALTER TABLE [FuncionarioSenha] ALTER COLUMN [PesSenLoc] VARCHAR(10) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'Pedido' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'PedPdvCod') ALTER TABLE [Pedido] ADD [PedPdvCod] INT NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'Pedido' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'PedPdvPedCod') ALTER TABLE [Pedido] ADD [PedPdvPedCod] INT NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod, PesSenItm Where PesSenLoc = AutorizaTela.ACESSOADMINISTRATIVO
GravaFuncionarioTelasAutorizadas.Call(EmpCod, 1, PesCod, AutorizaTela.SALDODEVEDOR, true, 'jaspireorg') GravaFuncionarioTelasAutorizadas.Call(EmpCod, 1, PesCod, AutorizaTela.VENDAABERTO, true, 'jaspireorg') GravaFuncionarioTelasAutorizadas.Call(EmpCod, 1, PesCod, AutorizaTela.VENDAFUNCIONARIO, true, 'jaspireorg')
EndFor EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.538' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'Duplicatas' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'CreStsFilaEnvHoj') ALTER TABLE [Duplicatas] ADD [CreStsFilaEnvHoj] VARCHAR(3) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'WhatsAppMensagem' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'WaIsConPlano') ALTER TABLE [WhatsAppMensagem] ADD [WaIsConPlano] BIT NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'FilaEnvioWhats' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'FilaWaGuid') ALTER TABLE [FilaEnvioWhats] ADD [FilaWaGuid] VARCHAR(40) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.537' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'WhatsAppMensagem' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'WaUsuCod') ALTER TABLE [WhatsAppMensagem] ADD [WaUsuCod] INT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'WhatsAppMensagem' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'WaSts') ALTER TABLE [WhatsAppMensagem] ADD [WaSts] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.536'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'EmpQtdNot') ALTER TABLE [Empresa] ADD [EmpQtdNot] INT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
//IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'Nome_Tabela' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'Nome_Campo') //Vai buscar especificamente na tabela especificada (Nome_Tabela) o campo especificado (Nome_Campo) e verificar se existe.
&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'Veiculos' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'VeiQtdPas') ALTER TABLE [Veiculos] ADD [VeiQtdPas] SMALLINT NULL" Do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'Veiculos' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'VeiRstUm') ALTER TABLE [Veiculos] ADD [VeiRstUm] VARCHAR(60) NULL" Do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'Veiculos' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'VeiApiJson') ALTER TABLE [Veiculos] ADD [VeiApiJson] VARCHAR(MAX) NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'MarcaVeiculo' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'VeiMarImg') ALTER TABLE [MarcaVeiculo] ADD [VeiMarImg] VARBINARY(MAX) NULL" Do 'RodaScript' &Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'MarcaVeiculo' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'VeiMarImg_GXI') ALTER TABLE [MarcaVeiculo] ADD [VeiMarImg_GXI] VARCHAR(2048) NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.535'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'FilaWhatsDestPesFonNum') ALTER TABLE [FilaEnvioWhats] ADD [FilaWhatsDestPesFonNum] VARCHAR(40) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'FilaWhatsMsgPedCod') ALTER TABLE [FilaEnvioWhatsMensagem] ADD [FilaWhatsMsgPedCod] INT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'FilaWhatsMsgNfeCod') ALTER TABLE [FilaEnvioWhatsMensagem] ADD [FilaWhatsMsgNfeCod] INT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'EmpQtdWhatsMsg0800') ALTER TABLE [Empresa] ADD [EmpQtdWhatsMsg0800] INT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'WaFilCod') ALTER TABLE [WhatsAppMensagem] ADD [WaFilCod] INT NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'WaPedCod') ALTER TABLE [WhatsAppMensagem] ADD [WaPedCod] INT NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'WaNfeCod') ALTER TABLE [WhatsAppMensagem] ADD [WaNfeCod] INT NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'WaCreCod') ALTER TABLE [WhatsAppMensagem] ADD [WaCreCod] INT NULL " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.534' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'EmpQtdWhatsMsg') ALTER TABLE [Empresa] ADD [EmpQtdWhatsMsg] INT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'WhatsApp') CREATE TABLE [WhatsApp] ( " &sql += " [EmpCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql += " [WaAnoMes] VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL, " &sql += " [WaAnoMesQtd] INT NULL, " &sql += " [WaAnoMesQtdExt] INT NULL, " &sql += " PRIMARY KEY ( [EmpCod],[WaAnoMes] )) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'WhatsAppMensagem') CREATE TABLE [WhatsAppMensagem] ( " &sql += "[EmpCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql += " [WaAnoMes] VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL, " &sql += " [WaGuid] VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL, " &sql += " [WaDtaEms] DATETIME NULL, " &sql += " [WaDtaHorEms] DATETIME NULL, " &sql += " [WaFonDest] CHAR(20) NULL, "
&sql += " [WaMensagem] VARCHAR(MAX) NULL, " &sql += " PRIMARY KEY ( [EmpCod],[WaAnoMes],[WaGuid] )) " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.533'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'ImoNom') ALTER TABLE [Imoveis] ADD [ImoNom] VARCHAR(100) NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TCon185') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon185] VARCHAR(1) NULL" Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.532'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'Imoveis') CREATE TABLE [Imoveis] (" &sql += "[EmpCod] INT NOT NULL," &sql += " [FilCod] INT NOT NULL," &sql += "[ImoCod] INT NOT NULL," &sql += "[ImoItr] VARCHAR(11) NULL," &sql += "[ImoIncra] VARCHAR(15) NULL," &sql += "[ImoMat] VARCHAR(20) NULL," &sql += "[ImoTip] VARCHAR(1) NULL," &sql += "[ImoCep] VARCHAR(9) NULL," &sql += "[ImoLog] VARCHAR(100) NULL," &sql += "[ImoNro] VARCHAR(10) NULL," &sql += "[ImoBai] VARCHAR(30) NULL," &sql += "[ImoCpl] VARCHAR(100) NULL," &sql += "[ImoCidCod] INT NULL," &sql += "PRIMARY KEY ( [EmpCod],[FilCod],[ImoCod] ))" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.indexes where name = 'IIMOVEIS2') CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IIMOVEIS2] ON [Imoveis] ([EmpCod],[ImoCidCod])" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'Imoveisparticipantes') CREATE TABLE [Imoveisparticipantes] (" &sql += "[EmpCod] INT NOT NULL," &sql += "[FilCod] INT NOT NULL," &sql += "[ImoCod] INT NOT NULL," &sql += "[ImoParPesCod] INT NOT NULL," &sql += "[ImoParPer] SMALLMONEY NULL," &sql += "[ImoParTip] VARCHAR(1) NULL," &sql += "PRIMARY KEY ( [EmpCod],[FilCod],[ImoCod],[ImoParPesCod] ))" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.indexes where name = 'IIMOVEISIMOVEISPARTICIPANTES2') CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IIMOVEISIMOVEISPARTICIPANTES2] ON [Imoveisparticipantes] ([EmpCod],[ImoParPesCod])" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'JurTip') ALTER TABLE [Juro] ADD [JurTip] VARCHAR(1) NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "update juro set jurtip = '1' where jurtip is null or jurtip = '0' " Do 'RodaScript' // For each Order EmpCod,JurCod // JurTip = juroTipo.SimplesDiario // EndFor EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.531' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'tmpPedNum') ALTER TABLE [NotaTemporaria] ADD [tmpPedNum] DECIMAL(10) NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'tmpNfeNatOpe') ALTER TABLE [NotaTemporaria] ADD [tmpNfeNatOpe] VARCHAR(120) NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'tmpNfeInsEst') ALTER TABLE [NotaTemporaria] ADD [tmpNfeInsEst] VARCHAR(20) NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'FilNom') ALTER TABLE [Filial] ADD [FilNom] VARCHAR(100) NULL" Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.530' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'CrvProRef') ALTER TABLE [CurvaABCProduto] ADD [CrvProRef] VARCHAR(18) NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'CrvProNom') ALTER TABLE [CurvaABCProduto] ALTER COLUMN [CrvProNom] VARCHAR(140) NULL" Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.529' &sql = "IF EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'ProTaxIcmsRet') ALTER TABLE [Produto] ALTER COLUMN [ProTaxIcmsRet] DECIMAL(9,4) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'NfeProTaxIcmsRet') Alter Table NotasProdutos alter Column NfeProTaxIcmsRet decimal(9,4) null " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.528' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TCon184') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon184] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.527' //CAMPO ESTA DANDO ERRO, NAO FOI CRIADO NAS TABELAS &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'SerItmAtuMan') alter table ServicoCliente add SerItmAtuMan Varchar(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'CbrOrd') ALTER TABLE [LocalCobranca] ADD [CbrOrd] SMALLINT NULL " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.526' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'IpProEstLoc') ALTER TABLE [ImportacaoProdutoItem] ADD [IpProEstLoc] VARCHAR(20) NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'IpProEstLocExt') ALTER TABLE [ImportacaoProdutoItem] ADD [IpProEstLocExt] VARCHAR(20) NULL" Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.525'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PesIsLidVer') ALTER TABLE [Pessoa] ADD [PesIsLidVer] BIT NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.524' &Sql = "IF EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'CteAveProt') ALTER TABLE [Cte] ALTER COLUMN [CteAveProt] VARCHAR(100) NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TCon183') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon183] VARCHAR(1) NULL" Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.523'
&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'Versao') CREATE TABLE [Versao] (" &Sql += " [VerCod] INT NOT NULL," &Sql += " [VerCmp] NVARCHAR(40) NULL," &Sql += " [VerIsLid] BIT NULL," &Sql += " [VerDtaLct] DATETIME NULL," &Sql += " [VerDtaUltSync] DATETIME NULL," &Sql += " PRIMARY KEY ( [VerCod] ))" Do 'RodaScript'
&Sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'VersaoItem') CREATE TABLE [VersaoItem] (" &Sql += " [VerCod] INT NOT NULL," &Sql += " [VerItmCod] INT NOT NULL," &Sql += " [VerItmTip] NVARCHAR(1) NOT NULL," &Sql += " [VerItmTit] NVARCHAR(1000) NULL," &Sql += " [VerItmDsc] NVARCHAR(MAX) NULL," &Sql += " [VerItmTar] NVARCHAR(40) NULL," &Sql += " PRIMARY KEY ( [VerCod],[VerItmCod],[VerItmTip] ))" Do 'RodaScript'
EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.522' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'ProCnaeCod') ALTER TABLE [Produto] ADD [ProCnaeCod] VARCHAR(20) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.521' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TCon181') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon181] VARCHAR(1) NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TCon182') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon182] VARCHAR(1) NULL" Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.520' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'ProCmbUfOri') ALTER TABLE [Produto] ADD [ProCmbUfOri] VARCHAR(2) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'ProCmbPerOri') ALTER TABLE [Produto] ADD [ProCmbPerOri] DECIMAL(7,4) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.519'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TCon180') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon180] VARCHAR(1) NULL" Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.518'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'CtlTabAnt') ALTER TABLE [Catalogo] ADD [CtlTabAnt] VARCHAR(5) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'DevTabAtu') ALTER TABLE [DeviceConexaoSincronizado] ADD [DevTabAtu] BIT NULL " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.516' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'AppCon009') ALTER TABLE [ConfigErpForcaVendas] ADD [AppCon009] INT NULL " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.515' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'DgnInfTraSem') ALTER TABLE [DiagnosticoInfestacao] ADD [DgnInfTraSem] VARCHAR(1) NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'RctProTraSem') ALTER TABLE [ReceituarioProduto] ADD [RctProTraSem] VARCHAR(1) NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'RctProTraDta') ALTER TABLE [ReceituarioProduto] ADD [RctProTraDta] DATETIME NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'RctProTraApl') ALTER TABLE [ReceituarioProduto] ADD [RctProTraApl] VARCHAR(50) NULL" Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.514' &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'DeviceConexaoSincronizado') CREATE TABLE [DeviceConexaoSincronizado] ( " &sql += " [DeviceId] VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL, " &sql += " [DevRandon] VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, " &sql += " [DevTabCod] VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL, " &sql += " [DevTabDtaUltSync] DATETIME NULL, " &sql += " PRIMARY KEY ( [DeviceId],[DevRandon],[DevTabCod] )) "
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TabDtaHorMod') ALTER TABLE [TabelaPreco] ADD [TabDtaHorMod] DATETIME NULL " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.513'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'DevSts') ALTER TABLE [DeviceConexao] ADD [DevSts] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'DevWwpContext') ALTER TABLE [DeviceConexao] ADD [DevWwpContext] VARCHAR(MAX) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'DevRandon') ALTER TABLE [DeviceConexao] ALTER COLUMN [DevRandon] VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF not EXISTS (Select * from sys.indexes where name = 'IRECEITUARIO1') CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IRECEITUARIO1] ON [Receituario] ([EmpCod],[RctFunCod])" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF not EXISTS (Select * from sys.indexes where name = 'IRECEITUARIO2') CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IRECEITUARIO2] ON [Receituario] ([EmpCod],[RctOciCliCod])" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'RctProTlvAtv') ALTER TABLE [ReceituarioProduto] ADD [RctProTlvAtv] SMALLINT NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.512' &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'FilaEnvioWhatsMensagem') CREATE TABLE [FilaEnvioWhatsMensagem] ( " &sql += " [EmpCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql += " [FilaWhatsGUID] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER NOT NULL, " &sql += " [FilaWhatsMsgGUID] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER NOT NULL, " &sql += " [FilaWhatsMsgArqNom] VARCHAR(40) NULL, " &sql += " [FilaWhatsMsgTip] VARCHAR(40) NULL, " &sql += " [FilaWhatsMsgTxt] VARCHAR(2000) NULL, " &sql += " [FilaWhatsMsgArqDirFis] VARCHAR(1000) NULL, " &sql += " [FilaWhatsMsgArqDirFisVir] VARCHAR(1000) NULL, " &sql += " [FilaWhatsMsgCreCod] INT NULL, " &sql += " [FilaWhatsMsgOrd] SMALLINT NULL, " &sql += " [FilaWhatsMsgSts] VARCHAR(3) NULL, " &sql += " PRIMARY KEY ( [EmpCod],[FilaWhatsGUID],[FilaWhatsMsgGUID] )) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'FilaEnvioWhats') CREATE TABLE [FilaEnvioWhats] ( " &sql += " [EmpCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql += " [FilaWhatsGUID] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER NOT NULL, " &sql += " [FilaWhatsFilCod] INT NULL, " &sql += " [FilaWhatsPesCod] INT NULL, " &sql += " [FilaWhatsPesFonCod] INT NULL, " &sql += " [FilaWhatsRespPesFonCod] INT NULL, " &sql += " [FilaWhatsQtdTen] INT NULL, " &sql += " [FilaWhatsDtaEms] DATETIME NULL, " &sql += " [FilaWhatsDtaUltTen] DATETIME NULL, " &sql += " [FilaWhatsDtaEnv] DATETIME NULL, " &sql += " [FilaWhatsDtaLim] DATETIME NULL, " &sql += " [FilaWhatsDtaIni] DATETIME NULL, " &sql += " [FilaWhatsSts] VARCHAR(3) NULL, " &sql += " FilaWhatsTip varchar(40) NULL, " &sql += " FilaWhatsDestPesCod INT NULL, " &sql += " FilaWhatsDestPesFonCod INT NULL, " &sql += " [FilaWhatsLog] VARCHAR(1000) NULL, " &sql += " FilaWhatsRespPesCod INT NULL, " &sql += " PRIMARY KEY ( [EmpCod],[FilaWhatsGUID] )) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'LogItemTela') ALTER TABLE [JaspiLogDevLogItem] ADD [LogItemTela] VARCHAR(100) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'CreStsFilaEnv') ALTER TABLE [Duplicatas] ADD [CreStsFilaEnv] VARCHAR(3) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'CreIsEnvWhats') ALTER TABLE [Duplicatas] DROP COLUMN [CreIsEnvWhats] " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'EmpJaspiChatAPIUrl') ALTER TABLE [Empresa] ADD [EmpJaspiChatAPIUrl] VARCHAR(200) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'WindowsApp') CREATE TABLE [WindowsApp] ( " &sql += " [WinAppGUID] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER NOT NULL ROWGUIDCOL, " &sql += " [WinAppEmpCod] INT NULL, " &sql += " [WinAppNom] VARCHAR(20) NULL, " &sql += " [WinAppPath] VARCHAR(1000) NULL, " &sql += " [WinAppIsHabilitado] BIT NULL, " &sql += " [WinAppNomFis] VARCHAR(40) NULL, " &sql += " [WinAppMaxIns] SMALLINT NULL, " &sql += " [WinAppArg] VARCHAR(500) NULL, " &sql += " PRIMARY KEY ( [WinAppGUID] )) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'WindowsAppInstancia') CREATE TABLE [WindowsAppInstancia] ( " &sql += " [WinAppGUID] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER NOT NULL, " &sql += " [WinAppInsGUID] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER NOT NULL, " &sql += " [WinAppInsPID] INT NULL, " &sql += " [WinAppInsDtaUltExe] DATETIME NULL, " &sql += " [WinAppInsLog] VARCHAR(1000) NULL, " &sql += " [WinAppInsSts] VARCHAR(1) NULL, " &sql += " PRIMARY KEY ( [WinAppGUID],[WinAppInsGUID] )) " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.511' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'NfeCanDup') ALTER TABLE [Notas] ADD [NfeCanDup] BIT NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TCon179') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon179] VARCHAR(1) NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'DevRandonUltSync') ALTER TABLE [DeviceConexao] ADD [DevRandonUltSync] DATETIME NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'SerItmAtuMan') ALTER TABLE [ServicoCliente] ADD [SerItmAtuMan] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.510' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'ViaCteMotVlr') ALTER TABLE [Viagens] ADD [ViaCteMotVlr] DECIMAL(17,2) NULL" Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.509'
//Adiciona o Ambiente da emissão de GNRE na tabela filial &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'FilAmbEmsGnre') ALTER TABLE [Filial] ADD [FilAmbEmsGnre] CHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
//Adiciona o campo de Erros na tabela de retorno da GNRE &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'GNREErros') ALTER TABLE [GnreEmitidasDadosGNRE] ADD [GNREErros] VARCHAR(MAX) NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
//Adiciona a tabela GnreConfig, responsável por conter as Uf's e receitas da UF para a GNRE &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'GNREConfig') CREATE TABLE [GNREConfig] ( " &sql += " [GnreConEmpCod] INT NOT NULL," &sql += " [GnreConFilCod] INT NOT NULL," &sql += " [GnreConUfeCod] VARCHAR(2) NOT NULL," &sql += " PRIMARY KEY ( [GnreConEmpCod],[GnreConFilCod],[GnreConUfeCod] ))" Do 'RodaScript'
//Adiciona a tabela GNREConfigReceitas, responsável por conter as receitas e as suas configurações para a GNRE &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'GNREConfigReceitas') CREATE TABLE [GNREConfigReceitas] ( " &sql += " [GnreConEmpCod] INT NOT NULL," &sql += " [GnreConFilCod] INT NOT NULL," &sql += " [GnreConUfeCod] VARCHAR(2) NOT NULL," &sql += " [GnreConRecCod] INT NOT NULL," &sql += " [GnreConRecDes] VARCHAR(255) NULL," &sql += " PRIMARY KEY ( [GnreConEmpCod],[GnreConFilCod],[GnreConUfeCod],[GnreConRecCod] ))" Do 'RodaScript'
//Adiciona a tabela GNREConfigReceitasProdutos, responsável por conte os produtos das receitas em especifico &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'GNREConfigReceitasProdutos') CREATE TABLE [GNREConfigReceitasProdutos] ( " &sql += " [GnreConEmpCod] INT NOT NULL," &sql += " [GnreConFilCod] INT NOT NULL," &sql += " [GnreConUfeCod] VARCHAR(2) NOT NULL," &sql += " [GnreConRecCod] INT NOT NULL," &sql += " [GnreConProCod] INT NOT NULL," &sql += " [GnreConProDes] VARCHAR(255) NULL," &sql += " PRIMARY KEY ( [GnreConEmpCod],[GnreConFilCod],[GnreConUfeCod],[GnreConRecCod],[GnreConProCod] ))" Do 'RodaScript'
//Adiciona a tabela GNREConfigReceitasDetalhamento, responsável por conter os detalhamentos das receitas em especifico &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'GNREConfigReceitasDetalhamento') CREATE TABLE [GNREConfigReceitasDetalhamento] ( " &sql += " [GnreConEmpCod] INT NOT NULL," &sql += " [GnreConFilCod] INT NOT NULL," &sql += " [GnreConUfeCod] VARCHAR(2) NOT NULL," &sql += " [GnreConRecCod] INT NOT NULL," &sql += " [GnreConDetCod] INT NOT NULL," &sql += " [GnreConDetDes] VARCHAR(255) NULL," &sql += " PRIMARY KEY ( [GnreConEmpCod],[GnreConFilCod],[GnreConUfeCod],[GnreConRecCod],[GnreConDetCod] ))" Do 'RodaScript'
//Adiciona a tabela GNREConfigReceitasDocumentoOri, responsável por conter os documentos de Origem das receitas em especifico &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'GNREConfigReceitasDocumentoOri') CREATE TABLE [GNREConfigReceitasDocumentoOri] ( " &sql += " [GnreConEmpCod] INT NOT NULL," &sql += " [GnreConFilCod] INT NOT NULL," &sql += " [GnreConUfeCod] VARCHAR(2) NOT NULL," &sql += " [GnreConRecCod] INT NOT NULL," &sql += " [GnreConDocCod] INT NOT NULL," &sql += " [GnreConDocDes] VARCHAR(255) NULL," &sql += " PRIMARY KEY ( [GnreConEmpCod],[GnreConFilCod],[GnreConUfeCod],[GnreConRecCod],[GnreConDocCod] ))" Do 'RodaScript'
EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.508'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PesFonWhatsPed') ALTER TABLE [PessoaFone] ADD [PesFonWhatsPed] BIT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PesFonWhatsFat') ALTER TABLE [PessoaFone] ADD [PesFonWhatsFat] BIT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PesFonWhatsBol') ALTER TABLE [PessoaFone] ADD [PesFonWhatsBol] BIT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'CreIsEnvWhats') ALTER TABLE [Duplicatas] ADD [CreIsEnvWhats] BIT NULL " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.507' &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PesAnxGuid') ALTER TABLE [PessoaAnexos] ADD [PesAnxGuid] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PesAnxGuidExt') ALTER TABLE [PessoaAnexos] ADD [PesAnxGuidExt] VARCHAR(40) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PesAnxGuidNom') ALTER TABLE [PessoaAnexos] ADD [PesAnxGuidNom] VARCHAR(100) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'LctNfeIndPres') ALTER TABLE [TipoLancamento] ADD [LctNfeIndPres] VARCHAR(2) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " update Empresa set EmpIsLog = 1 " //POR PADRAO GRAVA LOG EM TODOS Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.506'
&sql = " IF EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'NfeDocRefNfe') ALTER TABLE [NotasDocumentosReferenciados] ALTER COLUMN [NfeDocRefNfe] VARCHAR(54) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TCon178') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon178] VARCHAR(1) NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
//Faltava ajuste para &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'OpeMotTelNro') ALTER TABLE [OperacaoTransporte] ADD [OpeMotTelNro] VARCHAR(12) NULL" Do 'RodaScript' &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'OpeTipCar') ALTER TABLE [OperacaoTransporte] ADD [OpeTipCar] VARCHAR(2) NULL" Do 'RodaScript' &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'OpeViaSts') ALTER TABLE [OperacaoTransporteViagens] ADD [OpeViaSts] VARCHAR(1) NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.505'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'EmpIsLog') ALTER TABLE [Empresa] ADD [EmpIsLog] Bit NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'CbrApiKey') ALTER TABLE [LocalCobranca] ADD [CbrApiKey] VARCHAR(60) NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'MovViaLanCod') ALTER TABLE [Movimento] ADD [MovViaLanCod] INT NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'ViaLanHorTot') ALTER TABLE [ViagensLancamentos] ADD [ViaLanHorTot] SMALLINT NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'OpePgtSts') ALTER TABLE [OperacaoTransportePagamentos] ADD [OpePgtSts] VARCHAR(1) NULL" Do 'RodaScript' &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'OpePgtMotCan') ALTER TABLE [OperacaoTransportePagamentos] ADD [OpePgtMotCan] VARCHAR(500) NULL" Do 'RodaScript' &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'OpePgtSit') ALTER TABLE [OperacaoTransportePagamentos] ADD [OpePgtSit] CHAR(1) NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'OpeCiotPDF')ALTER TABLE [OperacaoTransporte] ADD [OpeCiotPDF] VARCHAR(MAX) NULL" Do 'RodaScript' &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'OpeTerCan')ALTER TABLE [OperacaoTransporte] ADD [OpeTerCan] BIT NULL" Do 'RodaScript' &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'OpePesCan')ALTER TABLE [OperacaoTransporte] ADD [OpePesCan] INT NULL" Do 'RodaScript' &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'OpeMotCan')ALTER TABLE [OperacaoTransporte] ADD [OpeMotCan] VARCHAR(500) NULL" Do 'RodaScript' &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'OpeDtaCan')ALTER TABLE [OperacaoTransporte] ADD [OpeDtaCan] DATETIME NULL" Do 'RodaScript' &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'OpeDtaEnc')ALTER TABLE [OperacaoTransporte] ADD [OpeDtaEnc] DATETIME NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
//Faltava ajuste para &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'OpeMotTelNro') ALTER TABLE [OperacaoTransporte] ADD [OpeMotTelNro] VARCHAR(12) NULL" Do 'RodaScript' &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'OpeTipCar') ALTER TABLE [OperacaoTransporte] ADD [OpeTipCar] VARCHAR(2) NULL" Do 'RodaScript' &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'OpeViaSts') ALTER TABLE [OperacaoTransporteViagens] ADD [OpeViaSts] VARCHAR(1) NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.504'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'SpedContPisCofins') ALTER TABLE [SpedEfdE110] ADD [SpedContPisCofins] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'SpedH010CtaAna') ALTER TABLE [SpedEfdE110] ADD [SpedH010CtaAna] VARCHAR(40) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'LogErpTabela') CREATE TABLE [LogErpTabela] ( " &sql += " [LogErpTabCod] VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL, " &sql += " [LogErpTabNom] VARCHAR(100) NULL, " &sql += " [LogErpTabPrmCod] VARCHAR(40) NULL, " &sql += " [LogErpTabCodNom] VARCHAR(140) NULL, " &sql += " PRIMARY KEY ( [LogErpTabCod] )) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'LogErpTabelaTabAtr') CREATE TABLE [LogErpTabelaTabAtr] ( " &sql += " [LogErpTabCod] VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL, " &sql += " [LogErpTabAtrCod] VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL, " &sql += " PRIMARY KEY ( [LogErpTabCod],[LogErpTabAtrCod] )) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF not EXISTS (Select * from sys.indexes where name = 'ILOGERPTABELATABATR2') CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [ILOGERPTABELATABATR2] ON [LogErpTabelaTabAtr] ([LogErpTabAtrCod]) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'LogErpRegistros') CREATE TABLE [LogErpRegistros] ( " &sql += " [LogErpRegGUID] [uniqueidentifier] ROWGUIDCOL NOT NULL, " &sql += " [LogErpTabCod] VARCHAR(40) NULL, " &sql += " [LogTrnCod] VARCHAR(40) NULL, " &sql += " [LogErpDtaHorMod] DATETIME NULL, " &sql += " [LogErpEmpCod] INT NULL, " &sql += " [LogErpFilCod] INT NULL, " &sql += " [LogErpRegCod1] VARCHAR(40) NULL, " &sql += " [LogErpRegCod2] VARCHAR(40) NULL, " &sql += " [LogErpRegCod3] VARCHAR(40) NULL, " &sql += " [LogErpUsuGuid] VARCHAR(40) NULL, " &sql += " [LogErpRegKey] VARCHAR(40) NULL, " &sql += " [LogErpExt] VARCHAR(MAX) NULL, " &sql += " [LogErpRegTip] CHAR(3) NULL, " &sql += " PRIMARY KEY ( [LogErpRegGUID] )) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF not EXISTS (Select * from sys.indexes where name = 'ILOGERPREGISTROS1') CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [ILOGERPREGISTROS1] ON [LogErpRegistros] ([LogErpTabCod]) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF not EXISTS (Select * from sys.indexes where name = 'ILOGERPREGISTROS2') CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [ILOGERPREGISTROS2] ON [LogErpRegistros] ([LogTrnCod]) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'LogErpRegistrosItem') CREATE TABLE [LogErpRegistrosItem] ( " &sql += " [LogErpRegGUID] UNIQUEIDENTIFIER NOT NULL, " &sql += " [LogErpTabAtrCod] VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL, " &sql += " [LogErpRegItmOld] VARCHAR(MAX) NULL, " &sql += " [LogErpRegItmNew] VARCHAR(MAX) NULL, " &sql += " PRIMARY KEY ( [LogErpRegGUID],[LogErpTabAtrCod] )) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF not EXISTS (Select * from sys.indexes where name = 'ILOGERPREGISTROSITEM2') CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [ILOGERPREGISTROSITEM2] ON [LogErpRegistrosItem] ([LogErpTabAtrCod]) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'LogErpTransacao') CREATE TABLE [LogErpTransacao] ( " &sql += " [LogTrnCod] VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL, " &sql += " [LogTrnNom] VARCHAR(200) NULL, " &sql += " PRIMARY KEY ( [LogTrnCod] )) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'LogErpConfig') CREATE TABLE [LogErpConfig] ( " &sql += " [EmpCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql += " [LogErpTabCod] VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL, " &sql += " [LogErpTabIsLog] BIT NULL, " &sql += " PRIMARY KEY ( [EmpCod],[LogErpTabCod] )) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF not EXISTS (Select * from sys.indexes where name = 'ILOGERPCONFIG1') CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [ILOGERPCONFIG1] ON [LogErpConfig] ([LogErpTabCod]) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'LogErpAtributos') CREATE TABLE [LogErpAtributos] ( " &sql += " [LogErpTabAtrCod] VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL, " &sql += " [LogErpTabAtrNom] VARCHAR(100) NULL, " &sql += " PRIMARY KEY ( [LogErpTabAtrCod] )) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.Tables where name = 'CaixaObs') CREATE TABLE [CaixaObs] ( " &sql += " [EmpCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql += " [CxPdvCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql += " [CxCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql += " [CxObsId] INT NOT NULL, " &sql += " [CxObs] VARCHAR(MAX) NULL, " &sql += " PRIMARY KEY ( [EmpCod],[CxPdvCod],[CxCod],[CxObsId] )) " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.503' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TCon176') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon176] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TCon177') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon177] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.502'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'CteCanDup') ALTER TABLE [Cte] ADD [CteCanDup] BIT NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'CreCteCod') ALTER TABLE [Duplicatas] ADD [CreCteCod] INT NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'CreCteFilCod') ALTER TABLE [Duplicatas] ADD [CreCteFilCod] INT NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TCon175') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon175] VARCHAR(1) NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
For each Order CteProTer,EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod Where CteProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA CteStsFin = Status_Financeiro.CANCELADO EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.501' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'NfeIpiEnq') ALTER TABLE [NotasProdutos] ADD [NfeIpiEnq] SMALLINT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'tmpNfeIpiEnq') ALTER TABLE [NotaTemporariaProduto] ADD [tmpNfeIpiEnq] SMALLINT NULL " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.500' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'ImpIpiEnq') ALTER TABLE [TabelaImposto] ADD [ImpIpiEnq] SMALLINT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'CteDupCbrCod') ALTER TABLE [CTEDuplicatas] ADD [CteDupCbrCod] INT NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'CteDupCreSeq') ALTER TABLE [CTEDuplicatas] ADD [CteDupCreSeq] INT NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'CteDupFilCod') ALTER TABLE [CTEDuplicatas] ADD [CteDupFilCod] INT NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'CteDupFrpPgtoCod') ALTER TABLE [CTEDuplicatas] ADD [CteDupFrpPgtoCod] INT NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF not EXISTS (Select * from sys.indexes where name = 'CTEDuplicatas') CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [ICTEDUPLICATAS2] ON [CTEDuplicatas] ( [EmpCod],[CteDupFrpPgtoCod])" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'CteSegRef') ALTER TABLE [CTESeguro] ADD [CteSegRef] INT NULL"
Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.499'
&sql = "update BandeiraCartoes set bancarsts = 'A' where BanCarSts is null " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'CnaeDtaHorUltMod') ALTER TABLE [CNAEServico] ADD [CnaeDtaHorUltMod] DATETIME NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
EndSub
Sub 'Atualiza' for each Order ProgressId where ProgressId = &ProgressId
If (ProgressValue = 0 or ProgressValue = 100 or ProgressValue.IsNull()) or &IsRetorna = false ProgressValue = &Percentual ProgressLogXml = &sql ProgressFin = &ProgressFin ProgressIni = &Progressini Else Return EndIF When none new ProgressId = &ProgressId ProgressValue = &Percentual ProgressLogXml = &sql ProgressFin = &ProgressFin ProgressIni = &Progressini Endnew endfor
commit EndSub
parm(in:&ProgressId, in:&EmpCmp, in:&IsWeb, in:&IsRetorna, in:&Progressini, in:&ProgressFin, in:&Percentual);
